## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run review` passes (all 7 checks green)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No new API keys, secrets, or `.env` values added to the tree
- [ ] Change is in scope per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (client code only — no backend, no curated data, no paywall logic)
- [ ] If touching UI: verified on both iOS and Android
- [ ] If touching strings/content: no breaking i18n changes
- [ ] If adding dependencies: justified in the "What changed" section (size + why the native alternative won't work)
